query: "gas prices" OR "gasoline prices" OR "oil prices" OR petrol

articles.title: Trump approval stuck at 35% as rising gas prices and cost of living push rating near career low
articles.description: President Donald Trump's approval rating remained at 35%, close to the lowest point of his political career, according to a Reuters/Ipsos poll. The survey found that most Americans expect gas prices to rise over the next year.

articles.title: Trump Says He's 'In Control' Of The Iran War. Gavin Newsom Points To $4 Gas Prices: 'Clearly That's Not T
articles.description: Gavin Newsom slams Trump as Iran war surpasses 100-day mark, causing inflation and rising fuel and grocery costs.

articles.title: Gold rises on weaker oil; inflation, rate outlook in focus
articles.description: GOLD prices firmed on Tuesday, supported by softer oil prices following a fragile Israel-Iran truce, while focus was also on inflation and interest rate hike risks.

articles.title: European shares steady; Middle East tensions in focus
articles.description:
European shares were steady at open as the developments in the Middle East stayed in focus, with oil prices easing after Iran and Israel halted attacks on U.S. President Donald Trump's appeal.
...

articles.title: European Markets Hold Steady Amid Middle East Developments
articles.description: European shares opened steady as tensions in the Middle East influenced market movements. Oil prices fell as Iran and Israel ceased attacks, while inflation concerns suggested a potential rate hike from the ECB. Healthcare stocks declined, while tech stocks showed recovery signs.

articles.title: Asian Paints, IndiGo lead gains in oil-sensitive stocks as crude falls below $93 on Israel-Iran ceasefire hopes
articles.description: Crude oil prices fell today, boosting paint, airline, and tyre stocks. IndiGo stock surged 3.8 percent, aided by positive broker ratings.

articles.title: Fitch Cuts FY27 India Growth Outlook, GDP Forecast Lowered To 6.4% Amid West Asia Tensions & Oil Price Risks
articles.description: Fitch Ratings has lowered India’s FY27 GDP growth forecast to 6.4 percent from its earlier estimate, citing the impact of the West Asia crisis and higher oil prices. While domestic demand remains strong, inflation risks, global uncertainties and weather-related challenges could weigh on economic growth.

articles.title: Fuel Price Hikes Spark Surge in CNG, Electric Vehicles Demand
articles.description: Increasing fuel prices are prompting buyers to seek fuel-efficient vehicles, particularly CNG and electric. Data from the Federation of Automobile Dealers Associations indicates a notable rise in sales for these alternatives following the petrol and diesel price hike in May 2026., Auto, Times Now

articles.title: China’s Oil Imports Plummet to Eight-Year Low
articles.description: China’s sharp cut in crude imports is easing pressure on oil prices, but its inventory cushion will eventually need replenishing.

articles.title: Oil falls as Iran-Israel attack pause leaves markets uncertain
articles.description: Oil prices declined on Tuesday, reversing most of the previous session’s gains, after Iran and Israel indicated a pause in direct attacks following a call from US President Donald Trump.
